---
name: Language / locale request
about: Add a new language locale for any niche (history, restoration, watches, etc.).
title: "[LOCALE] Add <Language> for <niche(s)>"
labels: locale, enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Target language

E.g. Spanish (Castilian + Latin American), Arabic (Fusha), Mandarin, Portuguese (Brazilian + European), Turkish, Persian, Hindi, French.

## Target niche(s)

Which niches should this locale lock to? E.g. cinematic history, abandoned mansion restoration, luxury watch restoration. "All niches" is acceptable but call it out.

## Register / tone goals

Describe the target register. Be specific:

- Literary equivalent of the language's archaic / formal register? Modern colloquial? Documentary-narrator? ASMR-whisper?
- What does the niche demand (e.g. grimdark for history, calm-instructional for restoration, intimate-foley for watches)?

## USE vocabulary (15-25 phrases)

List 15-25 words/phrases that lock the register. Provide gloss in English.

```
- <word/phrase> (<translation> — register note)
- <word/phrase> (<translation> — register note)
- ...
```

## AVOID vocabulary (5-10 phrases)

List 5-10 words/idioms that break register or feel out-of-niche.

```
- <word/phrase> — <why it breaks>
- ...
```

## TTS reference voice

Voice name + provider (ElevenLabs, Azure, PlayHT, etc.) + register note (e.g. "deep baritone, slow, somber" / "warm female mid-range, instructional pace").

## Optional example output

If you can translate one full Phase-1 output (script or master-prompt section) as proof of register, paste it here or link a gist.
